goal: Make the external CUDA training handoff actually run the generated real-adapter Docker image handoff before the RC handoff, without claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO.
docs_root_resolution: User requested current repo docs; /home/firewine/getbeta/docs protocol copy is reference-only for this checkout.
blocked_scope: Changing product/runtime API behavior, frontend behavior, DB schema, release readiness acceptance criteria, verified launcher behavior, or no-fake endpoint checks
Refreshing the external CUDA operator packet in this phase before the training-handoff source commit exists
Generating, inventing, copying, or promoting real adapter, endpoint, benchmark, package, export, release, or external evidence into the repository
Building or tagging mib-export:test from fake or self-test adapter material
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Committing model weights, strict model cache files, adapter artifacts, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied evidence bundles, transfer manifests, generated venv content, or Docker layers
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: Modify only the CUDA training handoff generator, packet verifier required command coverage, focused tests, regenerated training handoff artifacts, and LLM handoff docs. Source-pinned operator packet refresh is a required follow-up after this source commit exists.
required_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/prepare_cuda_lora_training_run.py --dataset-jsonl examples/fixtures/router_20.jsonl --dataset-id review_router_20 --base-model microsoft/Phi-3.5-mini-instruct --model-cache-dir /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache-phi/model_cache --output-root /tmp/mib-real-adapter --training-preset quick --json-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.json --markdown-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.md --shell-output artifacts/review/real_adapter_cuda_training_handoff.sh
warnings: This phase improves external operator execution continuity only.
Changing the training handoff artifact will make the existing operator packet stale until the follow-up source-pinned packet refresh.
M6-RC and v0 release remain NOT_GO until accepted real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exists.

phase_notes.plan: Insert an explicit run_docker_image_handoff step after prepare_docker_image and before run_rc_handoff.
phase_notes.audit: The generated training handoff currently creates a Docker image handoff script, then runs the RC handoff without first executing that script to build/inspect mib-export:test.
phase_notes.build: Patch generator command sequence, packet verifier required command coverage, focused tests, regenerated training handoff JSON/Markdown/shell, and LLM handoff docs.
phase_notes.check: Run focused tests, py_compile, regenerate artifacts, validate JSON/shell/evidence strings, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: Implementation and verification complete; commit and push pending. Follow-up operator packet refresh is required after this source commit exists. Release remains NOT_GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: Add run_docker_image_handoff to the CUDA training handoff command sequence before RC handoff and make packet verification require that command id.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/frontend/DB/schema/M6 review/packet artifact/launcher changes in this phase; no release GO claim; no generated model cache, adapter, Docker, endpoint, evidence bundle, transfer manifest, or venv artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: After verification passes, stage, commit, push over SSH, then refresh the source-pinned operator packet in a follow-up phase.
